top_risks.reasons: [LLM] Matches the high-risk pathogen list (Betacoronavirus) and has adequate read support (37 reads), warranting a High risk assessment for surveillance prioritization.
[LLM] Matches the high-risk pathogen list (Norovirus) and has substantial read support (24 reads), indicating a significant environmental signal.
[LLM] Non-pathogen virus with substantial read support (64 reads). Classified as Medium risk based on substantial signal, though it does not match the high-risk pathogen list.
